title: Monitor observed comms change
body: Monitor observed collaboration-state change. active claims: 2 (Wooded Spreading Thicket: Persistent non-blocking comms coordinator: monitor active claims, shared comms log, fresh comms events/messages/conversa; Sparking Charring Ash: Ratify ADR-173 + ADR-179 Accepted; promote graph-stack.plan.md current → active; refine WS1.1 row per Fred/type-expert/t) fresh surfaces: comms-events: 4a969485-7daa-4e81-b4e2-748e76a24381.json, c24924ca-f9c6-4c11-9d25-3b2da16eb224.json, 11a43161-afc9-46de-b4cc-3a8938b6c7f8.json | comms-messages: 198ee1a4-85d9-4313-af7a-bd3e2e49a9d3.json, 8a8811b0-c4bf-453e-b440-358b797fc057.json, 743cb9a7-0170-47a2-95e1-e0f1f85c60e6.json | conversations: pr-87-vercel-ignore-test-failures-prismatic-sidebar.json, pr-87-phases-3-6-vining-bending-root.json, ws3a-decision-thread-open.example.json | escalations: README.md Continuing 30-second non-blocking polling; no blocker.
